findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 33 findings from 7 agents into 24 unique findings. Removed 9 duplicates. Identified 4 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Review and Update Search Documentation (score=2.786); Guardrail Metric: Zero Result Rate (score=2.71); Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search (score=2.71); Lack of Instrumentation for New Search Features (score=2.71); Monitor Search Relevance Metrics (score=2.71)

top_priorities.title: Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search
Lack of Instrumentation for New Search Features

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 4 conflicts between agent findings. customer-001 vs feasibility-001: The new ranking algorithm has caused a drop in search relevance scores, affecting anonymous users, which contradicts the goal of improving search relevance.; customer-002 vs requirements-002: Increased mobile search latency contradicts the requirement to optimize mobile search latency to improve user experience.; metrics-004 vs requirements-009: The lack of instrumentation for new query types limits the ability to measure their performance, which contradicts the need to enhance the analytics dashboard for these features.

evidence.excerpt: The new ranking algorithm has caused a drop in search relevance scores, affecting anonymous users, which contradicts the goal of improving search relevance.
Increased mobile search latency contradicts the requirement to optimize mobile search latency to improve user experience.
The lack of instrumentation for new query types limits the ability to measure their performance, which contradicts the need to enhance the analytics dashboard for these features.
Potential PII handling issues due to the recent deployment contradict the recommendation to collect user feedback, which may involve sensitive data.

conflicts.description: The new ranking algorithm has caused a drop in search relevance scores, affecting anonymous users, which contradicts the goal of improving search relevance.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a thorough analysis of the ranking algorithm's impact on anonymous users and adjust the algorithm to mitigate negative effects.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the relevance drop for anonymous users is critical to maintaining user satisfaction and engagement, necessitating immediate corrective actions.

conflicts.description: Increased mobile search latency contradicts the requirement to optimize mobile search latency to improve user experience.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize the optimization of mobile search latency by profiling and implementing caching strategies to reduce latency below the target threshold.
conflicts.reasoning: Improving mobile search latency is essential for user satisfaction, especially given the recent increase in latency that has frustrated users.

conflicts.description: The lack of instrumentation for new query types limits the ability to measure their performance, which contradicts the need to enhance the analytics dashboard for these features.
conflicts.resolution: Implement analytics instrumentation for new query types before enhancing the analytics dashboard to ensure accurate performance measurement.
conflicts.reasoning: Establishing proper data collection is necessary to inform any dashboard enhancements and ensure that metrics reflect actual user interactions.

conflicts.description: Potential PII handling issues due to the recent deployment contradict the recommendation to collect user feedback, which may involve sensitive data.
conflicts.resolution: Ensure that any user feedback collection mechanisms are compliant with data minimization principles and include explicit consent for PII handling.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing privacy concerns is paramount, and feedback mechanisms must be designed to respect user privacy while still gathering valuable insights.

summary: Consolidated 33 findings into 24 unique items. Removed 9 duplicates, resolved 4 conflicts. Top priority: Review and Update Search Documentation.
